_publications._publicationTitle: Unraveling the development of cutaneous neurofibromas in neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: In mutant skin, the number of SCs was 37% higher than in controls; however, they remained quiescent and showed no MAPK activation
details: Loss of Nf1 in BC-derived Schwann cells resulted in 37% higher number of SCs compared to controls in young (P45) mice
